calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Vacated

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Continued To Dec-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Continued To Jun-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mary M. Sackett, Esq., of The Goldman Law Firm, Tel. 415.435.5500, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Oscar Raul Roesler, Esq., of The Law Offices of Arnold Laub, APC, Tel. 415.362.0101, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KARIM CANOUN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant satisfied his burden of production negating the elements of breach and causation and plaintiff did not present any admissible evidence creating a triable issue on either of those elements. Defendant's objections to Dr. Korn's declaration are sustained. Dr. Korn's opinion lacks evidentiary support and the statements regarding lack of informed consent are irrelevant because that theory of recovery is not alleged in the complaint. The trial date of April 30, 2012 is vacated and the new trial date is December 10, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Continued To Mar-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Oscar R. Roesler, Esq., of the Law Offices of Arnold Laub, Tel. 415.362.0101 x385, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KARIM CANOUN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to March 19, 2012. Courtesy copies of the opposition were delivered to the court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
